description_long: This is a double-car garage structure with a wide, steeply pitched black roof supported by sturdy stone columns at the front corners. The garage features two open bays, each large enough to accommodate a standard vehicle, with visible cars parked inside. The floor is paved with interlocking stone tiles, extending outward to form a small apron in front of the bays. The side and rear views reveal solid walls and a continuous roofline, with no visible windows or doors other than the open bays. The overall design is robust and functional, with a focus on sheltering vehicles and providing easy access. The materials and color palette suggest a blend of modern and rustic architectural influences.
description: A double-bay garage with a black pitched roof, stone columns, and open vehicle bays, set on a paved stone floor. The structure is robust and functional, blending modern and rustic elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open vehicle bays, stone columns, and parked cars under a wide black roof.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the solid back wall and the expanse of the black roof, with no visible openings.
description_view_2: Front view similar to view 0, but with a clearer look at the rear of the parked cars and the stone-paved apron.
description_view_3: Rear view mirroring view 1, showing the solid wall and roof with no visible doors or windows.
